subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who maketh mention of His servant on this night, that he may remember God, the Most Exalted, the Most Great, and draw him nigh unto the shore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی یذکر عبده فی هذا اللیل لیتذکر بذکر الله العلی العظیم و یقربه الی شاطی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
